title: Fix summary tabs, RB partial supply row, total orders sorting, bold orange design codes, remove image icon

requirements.summary: Restore summary tab value computation logic to match v158 behaviour so metric values update correctly when switching between dashboard tabs
acceptanceCriteria: Switching to the Ready tab shows summary card values computed only from Ready-status orders.
Switching to the Hallmark tab shows summary card values computed from Hallmark-status orders.
Switching to the Total Orders tab shows summary card values for all Pending orders.
Summary card values visibly change when navigating between tabs, matching v158 behaviour.
No regression in supply logic or ghost-row filtering in SummaryCards.tsx.

file_operations.description: Update the SummaryCards component to accept a tab-specific filtered orders array instead of computing metrics from all orders. Ensure the component filters out ghost rows (orders with originalOrderId) and computes metrics (order counts, weight, quantity, CO orders) only from the provided orders array. Remove any internal filtering by status that overrides the parent's filtering intent.

Update the Dashboard component to pass tab-specific filtered order arrays to the SummaryCards component. For the Total Orders tab, pass only Pending orders. For the Ready tab, pass only Ready-status orders. For the Hallmark tab, pass only Hallmark-status orders. For the Customer Orders tab, pass only CO-type Pending orders. For the Karigars tab, pass only Pending orders. Ensure each tab receives the correct subset of orders so SummaryCards computes metrics accordingly.

requirements.summary: Fix RB partial supplied row so it appears in the Ready tab after a partial supply action
acceptanceCriteria: After submitting a partial supply for an RB order via SuppliedQtyDialog, the supplied portion appears as a row in the Ready tab.
The remaining un-supplied portion stays in the Pending/Total Orders tab.
No other rows are affected or hidden in the Ready tab.

file_operations.description: Update the SuppliedQtyDialog component to ensure that when a partial supply is submitted for an RB order, the mutation correctly invokes the backend capability that creates a Ready-status row for the supplied quantity. Verify that the remaining quantity stays as a Pending order. After mutation success, invalidate the orders query to force a refetch so the Ready tab displays the newly supplied row immediately.

Ensure the ReadyTab component correctly displays all orders with Ready status, including partial supply rows that have an originalOrderId. Verify that no filtering logic inadvertently hides these rows. If ghost-row filtering is present, confirm it only applies to summary metrics and not to the displayed table rows.

requirements.summary: Within each design group in the Total Orders tab, sort rows from longest due (oldest order date) to least due (most recent order date), top to bottom, grouped by weight
acceptanceCriteria: Inside each expanded design group in TotalOrdersTab, rows are sorted so the oldest due date appears at the top and the most recent at the bottom.
Rows with the same weight are grouped together within this sort order.
The sort applies consistently to all design groups.
No other tab ordering is affected.

file_operations.description: Update the TotalOrdersTab component to sort orders within each design group. After grouping orders by design code, sort each group's orders by order date ascending (oldest first) and then by weight to group same-weight items together. Ensure this sort logic applies consistently to all design groups and does not affect other tabs.

requirements.summary: Display design code text in bold orange color in the design group header row in the Total Orders tab
acceptanceCriteria: Every design group header in TotalOrdersTab renders the design code in bold font weight.
The design code text color is orange (matching the app's orange accent, e.g., Tailwind orange-500 or equivalent).
The styling applies to all design group headers, not just selected ones.
No other text in the header is unintentionally changed.

file_operations.description: Update the design group header row rendering in TotalOrdersTab to apply bold font weight (font-bold) and orange text color (text-orange-500 or equivalent) to the design code text. Ensure this styling applies to all design group headers consistently without affecting other header elements.

requirements.summary: Remove the image icon from the design group header row in the Total Orders tab
acceptanceCriteria: No image icon is rendered in any design group header row in TotalOrdersTab.
The rest of the header layout (design code, counts, expand/collapse control) remains intact.
No other tabs or components have their image icons removed.

file_operations.description: Remove the image icon element from the design group header row rendering in TotalOrdersTab. Locate the icon component or element in the header and delete it, ensuring the rest of the header layout (design code text, counts, expand/collapse control) remains intact and properly aligned. Do not remove image icons from other tabs or components.
